parameters.name: Help
parameters.label: 🔎 Show Help
parameters.description: This will show some help information (guidance per table)

content.json:
# 🛡️ Endpoint Telemetry Coverage Dashboard
## Azure Monitor Agent (AMA) & Microsoft Defender for Endpoint (MDE) Correlation Report
---

### ⚠️ Prerequisites
This workbook requires **Microsoft Defender XDR data** to be ingested into Microsoft Sentinel. Without this integration, device name normalization and cross-table correlation may produce inconsistent results. As a workaround, you can copy the KQL queries from the [GitHub repository](https://github.com) and execute them in **Advanced Hunting** within the Microsoft Defender Portal.

---

### 📋 Purpose
This operational dashboard provides **unified visibility** into endpoint telemetry coverage across your hybrid environment. It correlates data from multiple sources to identify configuration gaps and ensure comprehensive security monitoring.

### 🎯 Key Objectives
- **Identify coverage gaps**: Detect devices with MDE installed but missing the Azure Monitor Agent (AMA)
- **Validate log ingestion**: Confirm devices are actively sending SecurityEvent and Syslog data to Sentinel
- **Monitor agent health**: Track last heartbeat and log ingestion timestamps to assess connectivity
- **Drive remediation**: Prioritize onboarding efforts for non-compliant endpoints

### 📊 Data Sources
| Table | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `DeviceInfo` | MDE enrollment and onboarding status |
| `Heartbeat` | AMA agent health and connectivity |
| `SecurityEvent` | Windows security log ingestion |
| `WindowsEvent` | Windows event log ingestion |
| `Syslog` | Linux security log ingestion |
| `Azure Resource Graph` | VM inventory and DCR associations |

### 👥 Target Audience
- Security Operations Center (SOC) analysts
- Security architects and engineers
- IT Operations and infrastructure teams
- Compliance and audit teams

items.name: Text - Explainer AMA and MDE correlation

content.json:
## 🔍 Global Filters
Use the filters below to customize the dashboard view. All visualizations will update dynamically based on your selections.

| Filter | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Workspace** | Select the Log Analytics workspace connected to Microsoft Sentinel |
| **Time Range** | Define the lookback period for log queries (default: 7 days) |
| **OS Platform Filter** | Text-based filter to include specific OS platforms (e.g., 'server', 'windows', 'linux') |
| **Has AMA** | Filter devices by AMA installation status (All / Yes / No) |
| **Exclude Compliant** | Hide fully compliant devices (MDE + AMA) to focus on remediation targets |
| **Exclude Workstations** | Hide DeviceType 'Workstation' (Windows 10/11) |

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.query: resources | where type =~ 'Microsoft.operationsmanagement/solutions' | where name contains 'SecurityInsights' | project id = tostring(properties.workspaceResourceId)

content.json:
## 📈 Executive Summary
High-level metrics showing the current state of endpoint telemetry coverage. These counts reflect the applied filters and provide a quick health check of your monitoring coverage.

| Metric | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Number of devices** | Total count of unique endpoints in scope |
| **AMA coverage** | Devices with Azure Monitor Agent installed and sending heartbeats |
| **No AMA** | Devices missing AMA - potential blind spots requiring remediation |
| **Non Compliant** | Count of non-compliant devices (not in 'MDE + AMA' state) |

content.query:
// Materialized base datasets for query performance
let defenderOnboarded = (
    DeviceInfo
        | where OnboardingStatus == "Onboarded"
    | where DeviceType <> '{ExcludeWorkstation}'
    | where DeviceType <> "Mobile"
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, ExposureLevel) by DeviceName
    | extend DeviceNameLower = tolower(tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]))
);
let defenderNotOnboarded = (
    DeviceInfo
        | where OnboardingStatus != "Onboarded"
    | where DeviceType <> '{ExcludeWorkstation}'
    | where DeviceType <> "Mobile"
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus) by DeviceName
    | extend DeviceNameLower = tolower(tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]))
);
let heartbeatData = (
    Heartbeat
        | summarize LastAMASeen = max(TimeGenerated), arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType, OSName, Category) by Computer
    | extend ComputerLower = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0]))
);
let secEventData = (
    SecurityEvent
        | summarize LastSecurityEvent = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
    | extend ComputerLower = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0]))
);
let winEventData = (
    WindowsEvent
        | summarize LastWindowsEvent = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
    | extend ComputerLower = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0]))
);
let syslogData = (
    Syslog
        | summarize LastSyslogEvent = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
    | extend ComputerLower = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0]))
);
// Part 1: Defender devices (onboarded) with AMA & log ingestion
(
defenderOnboarded
| join kind=leftouter (heartbeatData | project ComputerLower, LastAMASeen) on $left.DeviceNameLower == $right.ComputerLower
| join kind=leftouter secEventData on $left.DeviceNameLower == $right.ComputerLower
| join kind=leftouter winEventData on $left.DeviceNameLower == $right.ComputerLower
| join kind=leftouter syslogData on $left.DeviceNameLower == $right.ComputerLower
| extend 
    OSPlatform = tostring(OSPlatform),
    MDEStatus = tostring(OnboardingStatus),
    SensorHealth = tostring(SensorHealthState),
    ExposureLevel = tostring(ExposureLevel),
    HasAMA = iff(isnotempty(LastAMASeen), "Yes", "No"),
    SendsSecurityLogs = iff(isnotempty(LastSecurityEvent), "Yes", "No"),
    SendsWindowsEvents = iff(isnotempty(LastWindowsEvent), "Yes", "No"),
    SendsSyslogLogs = iff(isnotempty(LastSyslogEvent), "Yes", "No"),
    LastEvent = coalesce(LastSecurityEvent, LastWindowsEvent, LastSyslogEvent),
    Source = "Defender Device"
| project
    DeviceName = tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]),
    OSPlatform, MDEStatus, SensorHealth, ExposureLevel,
    HasAMA, LastAMASeen,
    SendsSecurityLogs, SendsWindowsEvents, SendsSyslogLogs,
    LastEvent, Source
)
// Part 2: AMA-only devices (Heartbeat present, NOT in Defender)
| union (
    heartbeatData
    | where ComputerLower !in (defenderOnboarded | project DeviceNameLower)
    | join kind=leftouter (
        defenderNotOnboarded
        | project DeviceNameLower, DefenderOSPlatform = OSPlatform, DefenderStatus = OnboardingStatus
    ) on $left.ComputerLower == $right.DeviceNameLower
    | join kind=leftouter secEventData on ComputerLower
    | join kind=leftouter winEventData on ComputerLower
    | join kind=leftouter syslogData on ComputerLower
    | extend 
        DeviceName = Computer,
        OSPlatform = coalesce(OSName, OSType, Category, "Unknown"),
        MDEStatus = iff(isnotempty(DefenderStatus), tostring(DefenderStatus), "Not in MDE"),
        SensorHealth = "",
        ExposureLevel = "",
        HasAMA = "Yes",
        SendsSecurityLogs = iff(isnotempty(LastSecurityEvent), "Yes", "No"),
        SendsWindowsEvents = iff(isnotempty(LastWindowsEvent), "Yes", "No"),
        SendsSyslogLogs = iff(isnotempty(LastSyslogEvent), "Yes", "No"),
        LastEvent = coalesce(LastSecurityEvent, LastWindowsEvent, LastSyslogEvent),
        Source = "AMA Only"
    | project
        DeviceName = tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]),
        OSPlatform, MDEStatus, SensorHealth, ExposureLevel,
        HasAMA, LastAMASeen,
        SendsSecurityLogs, SendsWindowsEvents, SendsSyslogLogs,
        LastEvent, Source
)
// Classification with MDE, AMA or both
| extend StatusCategory = case(
    Source == "Defender Device" and MDEStatus == "Onboarded" and HasAMA == "Yes", "MDE + AMA",
    Source == "Defender Device" and MDEStatus == "Onboarded" and HasAMA == "No", "MDE Only",
    Source == "Defender Device" and MDEStatus != "Onboarded", strcat("MDE ", MDEStatus),
    Source == "AMA Only", "AMA Only",
    "Unknown"
)
// Staleness indicator — compute days once, reuse in case()
| extend 
    DaysSinceLastEvent = iff(isnotempty(LastEvent), datetime_diff('day', now(), LastEvent), int(null))
| extend
    HealthStatus = case(
        isempty(LastEvent), "⚫ No Data",
        DaysSinceLastEvent <= 1, "🟢 Healthy",
        DaysSinceLastEvent <= 3, "🟡 Warning",
        DaysSinceLastEvent <= 7, "🟠 Degraded",
        "🔴 Stale"
    )
// Workbook parameter filters — filter first, then sort
| where '{HasAMA}' == 'All' or HasAMA == '{HasAMA}'
| where OSPlatform contains '{ServerFilter}'
| where StatusCategory <> "{ExcludeCompliant}"
| order by Source asc, DeviceName asc
// Summarize counts for tiles
| summarize
    TotalAll = count(),
    TotalYes = countif(HasAMA == "Yes"),
    TotalNo  = countif(HasAMA == "No"),
    TotalNonCompliant = countif(StatusCategory != "MDE + AMA")
| project
    Category = pack_array("Number of devices", "AMA coverage", "No AMA", "Non Compliant"),
    Total    = pack_array(TotalAll, TotalYes, TotalNo, TotalNonCompliant)
| mv-expand with_itemindex=i Category to typeof(string), Total to typeof(long)
| project-away i

// Materialized base datasets for query performance
let defenderOnboarded = (
    DeviceInfo
        | where OnboardingStatus == "Onboarded"
    | where DeviceType <> '{ExcludeWorkstation}'
    | where DeviceType <> "Mobile"
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, ExposureLevel) by DeviceName
    | extend DeviceNameLower = tolower(tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]))
);
let defenderNotOnboarded = (
    DeviceInfo
        | where OnboardingStatus != "Onboarded"
    | where DeviceType <> '{ExcludeWorkstation}'
    | where DeviceType <> "Mobile"
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus) by DeviceName
    | extend DeviceNameLower = tolower(tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]))
);
let heartbeatData = (
    Heartbeat
        | summarize LastAMASeen = max(TimeGenerated), arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSType, OSName, Category) by Computer
    | extend ComputerLower = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0]))
);
let secEventData = (
    SecurityEvent
        | summarize LastSecurityEvent = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
    | extend ComputerLower = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0]))
);
let winEventData = (
    WindowsEvent
        | summarize LastWindowsEvent = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
    | extend ComputerLower = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0]))
);
let syslogData = (
    Syslog
        | summarize LastSyslogEvent = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
    | extend ComputerLower = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0]))
);
// Part 1: Defender devices (onboarded) with AMA & log ingestion
(
defenderOnboarded
| join kind=leftouter (heartbeatData | project ComputerLower, LastAMASeen) on $left.DeviceNameLower == $right.ComputerLower
| join kind=leftouter secEventData on $left.DeviceNameLower == $right.ComputerLower
| join kind=leftouter winEventData on $left.DeviceNameLower == $right.ComputerLower
| join kind=leftouter syslogData on $left.DeviceNameLower == $right.ComputerLower
| extend 
    OSPlatform = tostring(OSPlatform),
    MDEStatus = tostring(OnboardingStatus),
    SensorHealth = tostring(SensorHealthState),
    ExposureLevel = tostring(ExposureLevel),
    HasAMA = iff(isnotempty(LastAMASeen), "Yes", "No"),
    SendsSecurityLogs = iff(isnotempty(LastSecurityEvent), "Yes", "No"),
    SendsWindowsEvents = iff(isnotempty(LastWindowsEvent), "Yes", "No"),
    SendsSyslogLogs = iff(isnotempty(LastSyslogEvent), "Yes", "No"),
    LastEvent = coalesce(LastSecurityEvent, LastWindowsEvent, LastSyslogEvent),
    Source = "Defender Device"
| project
    DeviceName = tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]),
    OSPlatform, MDEStatus, SensorHealth, ExposureLevel,
    HasAMA, LastAMASeen,
    SendsSecurityLogs, SendsWindowsEvents, SendsSyslogLogs,
    LastEvent, Source
)
// Part 2: AMA-only devices (Heartbeat present, NOT in Defender)
| union (
    heartbeatData
    | where ComputerLower !in (defenderOnboarded | project DeviceNameLower)
    | join kind=leftouter (
        defenderNotOnboarded
        | project DeviceNameLower, DefenderOSPlatform = OSPlatform, DefenderStatus = OnboardingStatus
    ) on $left.ComputerLower == $right.DeviceNameLower
    | join kind=leftouter secEventData on ComputerLower
    | join kind=leftouter winEventData on ComputerLower
    | join kind=leftouter syslogData on ComputerLower
    | extend 
        DeviceName = Computer,
        OSPlatform = coalesce(OSName, OSType, Category, "Unknown"),
        MDEStatus = iff(isnotempty(DefenderStatus), tostring(DefenderStatus), "Not in MDE"),
        SensorHealth = "",
        ExposureLevel = "",
        HasAMA = "Yes",
        SendsSecurityLogs = iff(isnotempty(LastSecurityEvent), "Yes", "No"),
        SendsWindowsEvents = iff(isnotempty(LastWindowsEvent), "Yes", "No"),
        SendsSyslogLogs = iff(isnotempty(LastSyslogEvent), "Yes", "No"),
        LastEvent = coalesce(LastSecurityEvent, LastWindowsEvent, LastSyslogEvent),
        Source = "AMA Only"
    | project
        DeviceName = tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]),
        OSPlatform, MDEStatus, SensorHealth, ExposureLevel,
        HasAMA, LastAMASeen,
        SendsSecurityLogs, SendsWindowsEvents, SendsSyslogLogs,
        LastEvent, Source
)
// Classification with MDE, AMA or both
| extend StatusCategory = case(
    Source == "Defender Device" and MDEStatus == "Onboarded" and HasAMA == "Yes", "MDE + AMA",
    Source == "Defender Device" and MDEStatus == "Onboarded" and HasAMA == "No", "MDE Only",
    Source == "Defender Device" and MDEStatus != "Onboarded", strcat("MDE ", MDEStatus),
    Source == "AMA Only", "AMA Only",
    "Unknown"
)
// Staleness indicator — compute days once, reuse in case()
| extend 
    DaysSinceLastEvent = iff(isnotempty(LastEvent), datetime_diff('day', now(), LastEvent), int(null))
| extend
    HealthStatus = case(
        isempty(LastEvent), "⚫ No Data",
        DaysSinceLastEvent <= 1, "🟢 Healthy",
        DaysSinceLastEvent <= 3, "🟡 Warning",
        DaysSinceLastEvent <= 7, "🟠 Degraded",
        "🔴 Stale"
    )
// Workbook parameter filters — filter first, then sort
| where '{HasAMA}' == 'All' or HasAMA == '{HasAMA}'
| where OSPlatform contains '{ServerFilter}'
| where StatusCategory <> "{ExcludeCompliant}"
| order by Source asc, DeviceName asc
| summarize Count = count() by StatusCategory
| order by Count desc
content.title: 📊 Coverage Distribution by Status Category

content.query:
// Coverage trend: MDE vs AMA device counts over time
let mdePerDay = 
    DeviceInfo
        | where OnboardingStatus == "Onboarded"
    | where DeviceType <> '{ExcludeWorkstation}'
    | where DeviceType <> "Mobile"
    | extend DeviceNameNorm = tolower(tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]))
    | summarize MDEDevices = dcount(DeviceNameNorm) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d);
let amaPerDay = 
    Heartbeat
        | extend ComputerNorm = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, ".")[0]))
    | summarize AMADevices = dcount(ComputerNorm) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d);
mdePerDay
| join kind=leftouter amaPerDay on TimeGenerated
| extend 
    AMADevices = coalesce(AMADevices, 0),
    CoveragePercent = iff(MDEDevices > 0, round(100.0 * coalesce(AMADevices, 0) / MDEDevices, 1), 0.0)
| project TimeGenerated, MDEDevices, AMADevices, CoveragePercent
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 📈 Coverage Trend: MDE vs AMA Device Counts Over Time

// Materialized base datasets for query performance
let defenderOnboarded = (
    DeviceInfo
        | where OnboardingStatus == "Onboarded"
    | where DeviceType <> '{ExcludeWorkstation}'
    | where DeviceType <> "Mobile"
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus, SensorHealthState, ExposureLevel) by DeviceName
    | extend DeviceNameLower = tolower(tostring(split(DeviceName, ".")[0]))
);
let defenderNotOnboarded = (
    DeviceInfo
        | where OnboardingStatus != "Onboarded"
    | where DeviceType <> '{ExcludeWorkstation}'
    | where DeviceType <> "Mobile"
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, OSPlatform, OnboardingStatus) by DeviceName

    ) on $left.ComputerLower == $right.DeviceNameLower

| where StatusCategory <> "{ExcludeCompliant}"
| order by Source asc, DeviceName asc
content.title: 📋 Endpoint Coverage Matrix: MDE Onboarding & AMA Log Ingestion Status

content.json:
# 📡 Data Collection Rule (DCR) Inventory
## Azure VM & Arc Machine DCR Assignments

This section provides a comprehensive view of **Data Collection Rules (DCRs)** assigned to your virtual machines across Azure and hybrid environments.

### 🔎 How to Use
1. Use the **VM Name** filter below to search for specific machines
2. Cross-reference with the coverage matrix above to identify machines with AMA but missing DCR assignments
3. Review the `dcrIds` column to verify correct DCR configuration

### 📌 Key Columns
| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **vmType** | Azure VM or Azure Arc-enabled server |
| **powerState** | Current VM power state (Running/Deallocated) |
| **hasAMAExt** | AMA extension installation status |
| **hasDCR** | Whether any DCR is associated with this machine |
| **dcrCount** | Number of DCRs assigned |
| **dcrIds** | List of assigned Data Collection Rule resource IDs |

content.query:
// List VMs with DCR associations, power state, and AMA extension version
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines' or type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend vmName = tolower(name),
         vmIdLower = tolower(id),
         resourceGroup = tostring(resourceGroup),
         subscription = tostring(subscriptionId),
         vmType = case(
             type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines', 'Azure VM',
             type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', 'Azure Arc',
             'Unknown'
         ),
         powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus)
| project vmName, vmIdLower, resourceGroup, subscription, vmType, powerState
// Join with AMA extension to get version
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions' or type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where name has_any ('AzureMonitorWindowsAgent', 'AzureMonitorLinuxAgent', 'AMA')
    | extend extVmIdLower = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/extensions/')[0])),
             amaExtVersion = tostring(properties.typeHandlerVersion),
             amaExtState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
    | project extVmIdLower, amaExtVersion, amaExtState
) on $left.vmIdLower == $right.extVmIdLower
// Join with DCR associations using full VM resource ID
| join kind=leftouter (
    insightsresources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.insights/datacollectionruleassociations'
    | extend assocIdLower = tolower(id)
    | extend vmIdFromDcra = tostring(split(assocIdLower, '/providers/microsoft.insights/datacollectionruleassociations/')[0])
    | extend dcrId = tolower(tostring(properties.dataCollectionRuleId))
    | where isnotempty(dcrId)
    | summarize 
        dcrIds = make_set(dcrId),
        dcraNames = make_set(name),
        dcrCount = dcount(dcrId)
        by vmIdFromDcra
) on $left.vmIdLower == $right.vmIdFromDcra
| extend hasDCR = iff(isnotempty(dcrCount), 'Yes', 'No'),
         hasAMAExt = iff(isnotempty(amaExtVersion), 'Yes', 'No')
| where vmName contains '{VMName}'
| project vmName, resourceGroup, subscription, vmType, powerState, hasAMAExt, amaExtVersion, amaExtState, hasDCR, dcrCount, dcrIds, dcraNames
| order by resourceGroup asc, vmName asc
content.title: 🖥️ Virtual Machine Inventory with DCR Associations & AMA Extension Status

content.query:
// AMA Extension version distribution across all VMs
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions' or type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where name has_any ('AzureMonitorWindowsAgent', 'AzureMonitorLinuxAgent', 'AMA')
| extend amaVersion = tostring(properties.typeHandlerVersion)
| where isnotempty(amaVersion)
| summarize Count = count() by amaVersion
| order by amaVersion asc
content.title: 📦 AMA Extension Version Distribution

content.json:
# 🔗 Unified Endpoint View: MDE + AMA + DCR Correlation
## Comprehensive Endpoint Telemetry Configuration Report

This consolidated table merges data from **Microsoft Defender for Endpoint**, **Azure Monitor Agent telemetry**, and **Data Collection Rule assignments** to provide a single source of truth for endpoint monitoring configuration.

### 💡 Recommended Usage
- Set **Has AMA = Yes** to focus on devices that should be sending logs
- Look for devices where `HasAMA = Yes` but `hasDCR = No` — these have AMA installed but no DCR configured
- Check `StatusCategory` to quickly identify the monitoring posture of each device

### 🚨 Common Issues to Look For
| Scenario | Issue | Remediation |
|----------|-------|-------------|
| `MDE Only` | Device has Defender but no AMA | Deploy AMA extension and configure DCR |
| `AMA Only` | Device has AMA but not onboarded to MDE | Onboard to Microsoft Defender for Endpoint |
| `hasDCR = No` | AMA installed but no DCR assigned | Associate appropriate DCR(s) for log collection |
| `SendsSecurityLogs = No` | AMA + DCR present but no logs received | Check DCR configuration and network connectivity |

content.title: 🖥️ Virtual Machine Inventory with MDE + AMA & DCR Associations Correlation
